subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice unto you! Your blessed missive, adorned with twin wings of joy and gladness, reached me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لکم الفداء نامه مبارکه آنحضرت که مزین بجناحین فرح و سرور بود بادنی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
